task_goal: Text the address of the event to Amelia Hernandez that Martin Muller just sent me in Simple SMS Messenger
task_goal_rewrite: An SMS containing the exact event address Martin Muller sent to the user is successfully sent to Amelia Hernandez in Simple SMS Messenger

checkpoints.description: A user-sent message exists in the Simple SMS Messenger conversation thread with Amelia Hernandez
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing the sent message in the conversation thread labeled 'Amelia Hernandez'

checkpoints.description: The sent message to Amelia Hernandez contains the exact event address that Martin Muller sent to the user
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the sent message content alongside Martin Muller's original message confirming the event address text matches exactly

success_rule: Success is confirmed when both required checkpoints are fully satisfied
